name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing both parties to share confidential information. Created by a committee of 40+ attorneys.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement - Cover Page
description: Cover page template to be completed and signed alongside the MNDA Standard Terms, capturing deal-specific details such as parties and purpose.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard terms for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, including subscription, support, and data obligations.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Standard terms defining uptime commitments, incident response, and service credits. Designed for use alongside the Common Paper CSA.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Standard terms governing the processing of personal data by a vendor on behalf of a customer, addressing GDPR and similar privacy obligations.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-stage design partnerships where a vendor engages a customer to co-develop and test a product before general availability.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Standard terms for engaging a vendor to provide professional services, covering deliverables, payment, IP ownership, and confidentiality.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for a business partnership, including reseller, referral, or co-sell arrangements between two companies.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Standard terms required under HIPAA when a covered entity engages a business associate to handle protected health information (PHI).

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premise or installed software, covering grant of license, restrictions, support, and payment terms.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement for a prospective customer to trial a product or service before committing to a full commercial agreement.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum addressing the specific risks and obligations of AI-powered products, covering data use, model training, transparency, and liability.
